overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a hazy, neon-lit Night City street at dusk. The player passes a convenience store, traverses an open plaza with a large digital billboard, and approaches the NCART metro station entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with convenience store and vending machines

events.description: passing a large metal pillar on the right side of the path
passing the convenience shop and entering a narrow alley passage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a corner convenience store with purple neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in shorts walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians walking away in the distance

entered.detail: small corner shop with purple neon roof trim and glowing OPEN sign
large vertical billboard with yellow '16' text high on building wall
tall vending machine with illuminated screen displaying colorful graphics
scattered trash and debris accumulated on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy, neon-lit sidewalk in a futuristic urban environment. The camera moves past a convenience store with distinctive purple neon trim and a glowing OPEN sign. Various pedestrians walk along the path, and a large billboard is visible high on the left building. The ground is littered with debris, contributing to the dystopian atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with digital advertising billboard

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open plaza area with wider sight lines
ascending concrete steps into the elevated plaza area
passing the large curved digital billboard on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing by concrete benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking past the camera from left to right
person sitting on concrete bench against the wall

entered.detail: large curved digital screen displaying anime characters with purple hair and KUSHI text
row of simple concrete benches along the right wall
trees visible through the haze in the background
building facade with continuous horizontal yellow neon strip lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a spacious urban plaza with a large digital billboard displaying anime-style advertisements on the right. The camera ascends steps into the plaza, passing concrete benches where people sit. The environment remains hazy with warm orange lighting, and a building with continuous neon strip lighting runs along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station approach with reflective pavement

events.description: NCART station sign becomes visible in the distance through the haze
camera tilts upward to look at the large NCART station sign overhead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the NCART station entrance while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in hat and vest walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit in yellow and cyan
station building with dark facade, glass windows, and cyan neon trim
vertical digital screens displaying various advertisements on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking toward the NCART transit station, which becomes visible through the haze. The large station sign with bright yellow and cyan lettering dominates the view overhead. The surrounding architecture features dark modern facades with glowing advertisement screens. The pavement becomes more reflective as the station entrance approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station entrance with ticket gates

events.description: entering the covered NCART station interior from the outdoor plaza
slowing down while approaching the ticket gates with green neon lights

agents.ego_description: entering the NCART station and approaching the ticket gates with green neon illumination

entered.detail: transit gates with vertical green neon lights and yellow-black caution striped floor
wall-mounted sign indicating surveillance in the area
automated ticket vending machines with glowing screens
vertical green neon tubes framing the entrance gates

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the NCART station interior, moving from the hazy outdoor environment into a sheltered space with heavy artificial neon lighting. The entrance features prominent gates framed by vertical green neon tubes and yellow-black caution stripes on the floor. Ticket machines line the left wall beneath a surveillance sign. The floor is highly reflective, mirroring the neon lights above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a hazy, neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a cluttered street into the structured interior of a transit hub. It begins on a debris-strewn sidewalk, moving past a convenience store accented with purple neon and a glowing open sign. As the camera ascends a set of steps, the narrow path opens into a spacious plaza dominated by a large anime-style digital billboard and warm orange lighting. The scene then shifts toward the NCART transit station, where the haze gives way to reflective pavement and a towering sign with bright yellow and cyan lettering. Finally, the camera moves from the outdoor atmosphere into the sheltered station interior, passing through gates framed by vertical green neon tubes and yellow-black caution stripes.
